description_long: This object is a large, straight-bladed sword with a single-edged design and a squared-off tip. The blade is long and flat, with a dark metallic finish and subtle surface markings. The crossguard is prominent, extending horizontally with one side curving downward, providing hand protection and a distinctive silhouette. The handle is straight and cylindrical, appearing to be made of the same dark metal as the blade, and ends in a rounded pommel. The overall construction suggests a robust, utilitarian weapon, possibly inspired by historical or fantasy designs. There are no visible decorative elements or a sheath accompanying the sword.
description: A large, straight-bladed sword with a dark metallic finish, prominent crossguard, and a simple cylindrical handle.
description_view_0: The sword is seen from the broad side, showing the full length of the blade, the crossguard, and the handle with its rounded pommel.
description_view_1: A narrow edge-on view, highlighting the thinness of the blade and the straight alignment of the handle and guard.
description_view_2: The opposite broad side of the sword, mirroring view 0, with the blade, crossguard, and handle clearly visible.
description_view_3: Another edge-on view, similar to view 1, emphasizing the blade's thin profile and the straight handle.
attribute_handle_design: straight cylindrical metal handle with rounded pommel
